stocks.impact_theory: Iran ceasefire news reduces geopolitical risk, boosting risk-on sentiment from extreme fear. Lower oil prices benefit cruise operators by cutting fuel costs. Market psychology shifts to optimism for travel recovery. Historical parallel: Post-Ukraine invasion oil spike hurt airlines/cruises, reversal now helps. Analogies: Like deflating a balloon (risk premium easing), or switching from storm clouds to sunshine for vacation bookings.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X posts show +11.6% move on solid cruise demand amid ceasefire. Web news on strong bookings despite fuel worries earlier. Sentiment shift positive with market rally.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 10-15% gains on continued risk-on, target $20-21.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or short if oil rebounds, potential 5% loss.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Renewed Middle East tensions spiking oil, weak consumer spending.

stocks.justification: Strong X mentions and premarket momentum, but volatile geopolitics.

stocks.impact_theory: Ceasefire drops oil prices, hurting chemical margins reliant on petrochem feedstocks. Rally losing steam after year run-up. Psychology: Fear of lower input costs not translating to profits. Parallel: 2020 oil crash crushed chemicals. Analogies: Like a car running out of gas mid-race, or tide going out exposing rocks.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X post -10.9% as chemical rally fades post-ceasefire. News on oil-driven margins but now reversing.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Avoid, potential 5% dip buy if stabilizes.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Oil stabilization or demand surge boosting chemicals.

stocks.justification: Clear link to oil drop, high volume move.

stocks.impact_theory: Earnings anticipation in AI/semicon boom, sentiment shift on sector rotation. Psychology: FOMO on AI supply chain. Parallel: 2023 semi rally. Analogies: Rocket fuel ignition, or snowball rolling downhill.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X +19% ahead of earnings, web on Q1 release April 30 but momentum now. AI tailwinds.

stocks.justification: Earnings catalyst strong, but small cap volatility.

stocks.impact_theory: Similar to CCL, ceasefire risk-off relief boosts cruises. Lower fuel aids. Psychology: Travel rebound. Parallel: COVID recovery rally. Analogies: Clearing skies for sail, weight lifted off anchors.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Premarket +8.44%, sector rotation to cyclicals on positive geo news.

stocks.impact_theory: Cruise leader benefits most from risk-on, record bookings. Oil drop positive. Psychology: Leader effect. Parallel: Post-9/11 travel recovery. Analogies: Captain steering into favorable winds, fleet gaining speed.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Premarket +7.84%, strong fundamentals amid sentiment shift.

stocks.justification: Largest cap, dividend hike, consistent outperformer.
